channel.title: Reversing on My New Hugo Site
channel.description: Recent content in Reversing on My New Hugo Site

item.title: packer
item.author: email@example.com (abund4nt)
item.description: We are provided with an out binary that when executed asks for a password, if we enter random strings it shows Access denied. $ ./out Enter the password to unlock this file: test You entered: test Access denied By using strings to search for strings, we can see that the binary was compressed using UPX. $ strings out ... $Info: This file is packed with the UPX executable packer http://upx.sf.net $ $Id: UPX 3.

item.title: Bit-O-Asm-1/2/3/4
item.author: email@example.com (abund4nt)
item.description: Bit-O-Asm-1 We are provided with a disassembler-dump0_a.txt file. <+0>: endbr64 <+4>: push rbp <+5>: mov rbp,rsp <+8>: mov DWORD PTR [rbp-0x4],edi <+11>: mov QWORD PTR [rbp-0x10],rsi <+15>: mov eax,0x30 <+20>: pop rbp <+21>: ret Also the description helps us to better understand how to solve the challenge. (For all the following challenges it is the same, so I won’t put it again). Can you figure out what is in the eax register?
